description: Zoho MCP is a Zoho service for creating MCP servers that expose tools from Zoho and third-party applications to AI clients such as Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and VS Code. Users configure tools in a Zoho-managed server and connect that server to an MCP-compatible client to run workflows across connected services.
summary: zohomcp.sa exposes a Zoho MCP server surface for connecting AI/MCP clients; docs describe OAuth-based connection and also treat the generated MCP URL as a secret/API-key-like credential.
